programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A security guard was confronted by a masked man with a gun and 11-year-old Tye Hawkins was knocked down in a hit-and-run.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Okla., Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders enjoy an evening out at a casino; the next morning, the two are shot outside their apartment complex; investigators soon learn that the shooter was driving a distinctive gold Pontiac.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: When Abbi sees her boyfriends darkness, she tries to help but cannot. She hopes being a father will change him, but it doesnt. When his cruelty becomes too much to handle, she leaves and discovers who her boyfriend was all along.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Wallace thinks his brother will guide his family to salvation. However, Wallace soon finds that he must choose between loyalty to his family or to his churchs new prophet.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Police rely on surveillance cameras while looking for a respected businessman who vanishes after a meeting and a young mother who doesnt return from her job search.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the brutal slaying of a homeless man, James Tony Wise, Portland PD, turns to the footage from CCTV cameras to find his killer; detectives use the images to retrace the rampage through the city of a violent offender.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing womans three-year-old son.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.desc: Rocker Billy Idols journey from underground star to pop icon unfolds in a documentary chronicling his fame, drug use and powerful return to music.

programme.title: INXS: Live Baby Live
programme.desc: The group performs "Guns in the Sky," "New Sensation," "Send a Message" and other hits in concert at Wembley Stadium in London.

programme.title: INXS: Live Baby Live
programme.desc: The group performs "Guns in the Sky," "New Sensation," "Send a Message" and other hits in concert at Wembley Stadium in London.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandoras Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. When the evil Vulture emerges to cause havoc, everything Peter loves is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A domesticated terrier and his unruly canine pal encounter a rebellious bunny and his gang of abandoned pets.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Max the terrier encounters canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a scary turkey when he visits the countryside. Luckily for Max, he soon catches a break when he meets Rooster, a gruff farm dog who tries to cure the lovable pooch of his neuroses.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When Christina and Courtney take their romantically disillusioned roommate Jane on a night out, Christina meets Peter and falls hopelessly in love with him. However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: An ordinary cabbie uses gadget-laden formal wear to combat a villain who wants to poison the worlds water supply.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydias life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuices name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A lonely poet whos unlucky in love believes hes struck gold when he meets Harriet, an attractive, witty woman who owns a butchers shop. They fall in love and marry, but a series of strange occurrences lead him to suspect that his new wife may be harbouring a dark and deadly secret.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A lonely poet whos unlucky in love believes hes struck gold when he meets Harriet, an attractive, witty woman who owns a butchers shop. They fall in love and marry, but a series of strange occurrences lead him to suspect that his new wife may be harbouring a dark and deadly secret.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: An aimless teen in Brooklyn, NY, spends the summer with his delinquent buddies, a potential new girlfriend and older men that he meets online.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: Satirical drama in which an idealistic lawyer who tries to win cases for clients trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system finds himself defending a venal and self-righteous judge accused of rape. The judge wrongly assumes the lawyers ideals and disdain for the courts will drive him to get an acquittal, despite the evidence and the loathing they have for each other.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: Satirical drama in which an idealistic lawyer who tries to win cases for clients trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system finds himself defending a venal and self-righteous judge accused of rape. The judge wrongly assumes the lawyers ideals and disdain for the courts will drive him to get an acquittal, despite the evidence and the loathing they have for each other.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula, who operates a high-end resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the counts teen-aged daughter.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, theyll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: Hilarity and horror ensue when toothy, carnivorous aliens escape from their space prison, pursued by two merciless bounty hunters. When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A scientifically miniaturised marine unexpectedly finds himself floating around the body of a hypochondriac, and trying to outwit saboteurs who want the device that shrank him. Attempts by his colleagues to retrieve the little man - protected inside a tiny submersible - are hampered by the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batmans fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off
programme.desc: A teen perpetrates a series of elaborate deceptions to ensure that he and two friends spend a carefree day in Chicago.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: Its the 90s and, while the world has moved on, they havent, with parents Mike and Carol and their brood now irritating anachronisms rather than the loved, slightly goofy family. As theyve forgotten to pay their property taxes, next-door neighbour Mr Diymeyer can buy up their home and raze it to the ground as part of his property development schemes. Can the family raise $20,000 in just one week?

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: After being kicked out of his apartment by his girlfriend, Steven hears that if he slips a cable guy $50, he can get hooked up with free cable - but at what further cost? Can Steven gently reject the cable guys insane attempts to be best buds and also get his girlfriend back?

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When Christina and Courtney take their romantically disillusioned roommate Jane on a night out, Christina meets Peter and falls hopelessly in love with him. However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isnt invited to the ceremony, but hes determined not to be left out.

programme.title: American Pie: Reunion
programme.desc: Outrageous antics ensue when Jim, Michelle, Stifler and the gang get back together for their 13-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Panda Plan
programme.desc: An action movie star must protect baby pandas from a group of mercenaries.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A slick attorney fails to show up for his sons fifth birthday, prompting the boy to make a wish that his father would tell the truth for just one day. Miraculously, the wish is granted and for the next 24 hours, the formerly mendacious lawyer is unable to tell a single lie.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: After being kicked out of his apartment by his girlfriend, Steven hears that if he slips a cable guy $50, he can get hooked up with free cable - but at what further cost? Can Steven gently reject the cable guys insane attempts to be best buds and also get his girlfriend back?

However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Megan and Noah uncover a long-buried corpse in their parents basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating spiral of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: Fantastical creatures come to life when a girls sketchbook falls into a strange pond. As the town starts to unravel, she and her brother must track down the unpredictable, chaotic and dangerously real monsters before they cause permanent damage.

programme.title: Hostages
programme.desc: Comedy thriller about five strangers caught in an unfolding terrorism situation. Language. (2025, 90 mins)

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Tech billionaire Lex Luthor seizes the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Supermans four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before its too late?

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.desc: Police hunt a man wanted for domestic violence. Plus, a tip-off leads to a drugs raid and an uninsured driver gives officers the runaround.

programme.title: Brit Cops: Rapid Response
programme.desc: Following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime.

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: Madonna is the first Kinda baboon ever to be studied from birth to adulthood and now, critically, she is looking for a mate. Only recently identified as a species in their own right, Kinda baboons are little known and little understood.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Beni, obsessed with food, shudders as he receives a dramatic, educational smackdown from the local dominant male, Petruk. Meanwhile, Spanser, a spoiled rich kid and former illegal pet, attempts to control his sweet tooth.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: An adventure with Thiago, a brave baby coati. Explores how this raccoon-like animal sharpens his sniffing and foraging skills, crosses suburban roads near his lush Brazilian forest home, and avoids inanimate and four-legged dangers.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A look at the lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at the worlds biggest sanctuary, Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: Across Africa 97 black rhinos have been killed for their horns. In 1997 the species was declared officially extinct in Zambia, but now, thanks to an ambitious reintroduction plan, they are back.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: The race to contain a case of malaria brought in by orphaned infant Cesia is followed by an assessment of Sris plan to help Bumi. Meanwhile, observers notice the positive influence Daput, a wild orangutan mum, has on the college females.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: In the hot, and humid tropical forests of Southern India, a female King Cobra is on a mission. She needs to find a mate, find food and lay her eggs, all before the monsoon arrives in 5 months time.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough

programme.title: Attenboroughs Journey
programme.desc: Follow David Attenborough around the globe as he films David Attenboroughs First Life.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons And Damsels
programme.desc: They are beautiful, their behaviours are as complex as mammals and they have existed since the dinosaurs. Join David Attenborough as he delves into the life of dragonflies and damselflies.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores the volcanic islands and biological wonderland of Galapagos in this three-part documentary. Here, he charts the archipelagos explosive rise from the ocean millions of years ago, and takes a look at its unique wildlife.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: David Attenborough stumbles upon species found nowhere else in the world that show how life has to quickly adapt to the islands ever-changing landscapes.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the unusual species that inhabit the unique islands of Galapagos, including giant tortoise Lonesome George.

programme.title: Hindenburg Crash Mystery
programme.desc: In 1937 the Nazi Hindenburg airship burst into flames. New film raised doubts. Tragic accident or sabotage? Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: The tank which first reared its head in World War I, fine-tuned by the Nazis as an integral part of their blitzkrieg tactics. As their Panzers conquered most of Europe, the Soviets were developing their own T34, more suited to their own harsher terrain, a turning point in the war.

programme.title: Secrets of WW2
programme.desc: From the embarrassment of surrender, the French Resistance developed over the course of WWII into an effective and brave fighting force. They played a key role in the liberation of France.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: The Special Operations Executive whose task was to nurture and support the Resistance movements across occupied Europe. the Middle and Far East, and whose operatives worked under constant threat to their lives.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The B-24 Liberator more than proved its worth over Europe and the Pacific, patterning the B17 to deliver a blow to the axis powers in WWII, however it wasnt simply a bomb delivery system.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: During the Blitzkrieg, the Allies worked furiously to keep their ground.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: The siege of the Soviet Unions second city lasted for 890 days and provided WWII with one of its most harrowing episodes.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: At Midway, in June 1942, the whole course of the Pacific War was transformed in less than five minutes, when US divebombers devastated Japans vital aircraft carriers. Plus the events of Leyte Gulf in October 1944, when the Japanese Imperial Navy staked everything on an assault by its battleships against the US landings on the Philippines.

programme.title: London: 2,000 Years of History
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores Crossrail to discover the ruins of Roman Londinium, Suzannah Lipscomb gets to know Boudica, and Rob Bell investigates the first London Bridge, built by the Romans but ransacked by the Vikings.

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.sub-title: Victory and Controversy at El Alamein
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East. Tim Collins re-investigates Britains critical desert campaign.

programme.title: 21st Century War Machines
programme.sub-title: Hellfire and Brimstone: The Helicopter Gunship
programme.desc: Simon Pearson shares his knowledge and opinion on the latest innovations in helicopter gunships and their role in modern warfare.

programme.title: Wrecks That Changed the World
programme.desc: Uncovering the gripping stories behind the most fascinating wrecks in the worlds oceans.

programme.title: When the Boat Comes In
programme.sub-title: Whatever Made You Think the War Was Over
programme.desc: Sir Horatio Manners calls in his favour from Jack - and Jack pays him back with interest.

programme.title: Anastasia Mystery
programme.desc: After the Romanovs were executed, rumours claimed Anastasia survived. Anna Anderson later emerged as a claimant. Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: With attacks on both Pearl Harbor and Sydney Harbour, midget submarines played their part in some of the most gripping stories of the war.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the tools of espionage employed by both the Allies and the Axis during World War II.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: In this episode, the soldiers whose name has become a synonym for heroism and tackling the seemingly impossible. What was the task of Britains elite military force, the SAS, in World War II?

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The B-25, often called the forgotten bomber, the mighty North American twin delivered the first blow in the fight back against Japan, in one of the most daring and audacious raids of all time.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: During the Blitzkrieg, the Allies worked furiously to keep their ground.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: The course of the fight by the British and American navies against the German submarine U-Boat threat, a tense cat-and-mouse struggle that by the end of the war had cost over 100,000 lives.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: The programme examines why leaders, often political rather than military, decide on the use of a pre-emptive strike, with two notorious examples. The first is December 6th, 1941, the `day of infamy, when a Japanese surprise attack on the US fleet base at Pearl Harbour brought the United States into World War II. The second is the Israeli attack which began the Six-Day War of June 1967.

programme.title: London: 2,000 Years of History
programme.desc: Dr Suzannah Lipscomb is granted access to view artefacts from Henry VIIIs pleasure palace. Dan Jones tells the story of Dick Whittington in full and discovers what 14th Century skeletons reveal about the Black Death.

programme.title: 21st Century War Machines
programme.desc: Bombers and stealth aircrafts, as well as surface-to-air missile systems, are examined; their evolution and fit in modern warfare is considered.

programme.title: Wrecks That Changed the World
programme.desc: Uncovering the gripping stories behind the most fascinating wrecks in the worlds oceans.

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: It was Hitlers deadliest secret. His scientists had promised him an atomic bomb. If he got it first, Nazi domination was assured. In 1943, a team of Norwegian raiders was sent to destroy a depot in the heart of Norway where heavy water, the one thing needed to complete the bomb, was produced. This documentary explores the raid, with veterans accounts, archive film, reconstructions, and 3-D graphics.

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve explores Australia. His adventure starts in the `red centre of the continent and onwards through South Australia via the extraordinary Indian Pacific Railway, until he reaches the west coast city of Perth. On the way, he joins an Aussie rancher in the parched outback and visits the lucrative tuna fishing city of Port Lincoln. Finally in Perth, Simon discovers a full scale British invasion.

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Darwin in Australias Northern Territory or `Top End, across to the remote Cape York Peninsula, and on to the Great Barrier Reef. Simon sets off from Kakadu, the largest national park in the world, where the wildlife is under threat from the march of millions of poisonous cane toads. He joins a team of toad-busters catching the amphibian invaders.

programme.title: Australia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels down the east coast of Australia. The final part of his journey begins in Surfers Paradise, near the city of Gold Coast. Then, in the East Coast suburbs, Simon joins a vet and his team who rescue and treat injured koalas. In Sydney, Simon investigates attitudes to immigration among Australians. Finally, Simon takes to the air as he travels to Melbourne - arriving just in time for Australia Day.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Replaced at work by a box, Victor embarks on his enforced retirement. As an erstwhile security officer, he finds it exasperatingly difficult to adapt to this directionless new existence, and he begins magnifying mundane aspects of everyday life into major dramas.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to help her husband cope with early retirement by getting him a book from the library entitled `Coping with Old Age. Maybe keep-fit classes at the local adult education centre will help take Victors mind off the depressing turn of events?

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Sardonic Victors life continues to be a trial - someone paints graffiti on the side of his house and the central heating system is making a deafening noise. To add to that theres a nasty smell coming from the living-room.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is convinced he is going insane after being trapped in a shed by a swarm of bees, he is stuck in the opticians for a day with his eyes shut, and then left to babysit some unruly children.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up drawing at a life class, but Margarets enthusiasm for his new hobby wanes when she discovers that he has given the model a lift home.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Speckled Band
programme.desc: Before the Meldrews can leave for their holiday in Athens, they must cope with Victors fear of flying, Mrs Warboys food poisoning, and a snake on the loose.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Midwife Linda Abbott returns to Leeds General. A year after retiring she realised she missed working at the hospital. Two dads with extremely different bedside manners are in the maternity wards in this episode. Joel dotes on his wife Rachel and wants there just to be the two of them in the delivery room. Dan, meanwhile, prefers digs towards his partner Kerry.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Theres a nationwide baby-boom in September and the midwives at the Leeds General Infirmary are run off their feet. When their unit is full they often send the overspill to St Jamess Hospital across the city and vice versa, which means a last-minute change in birth plans for some mums, including Natalie, Kate, and Rachel.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its induction day for 26 junior doctors as they pick up their passes and scrubs for the Emergency Department and try to get their bearings around the Royal Berkshire Hospital.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Junior doctor Alex handles a paracetamol overdose and a high-risk heart patient, Adnan braves his first shift in Resus, and Claire deals with a woman in agonising stomach pain.

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.desc: Shana knows she can be uptight, but talking to friends about a terminal cancer diagnosis is daunting; the Death Cleaners help her face her fear of discussing "the end."

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life, from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, as well as the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and The Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Flower, the first dog ever to take a dislike to him, can he win her trust? He also helps Heidi and Marvin, both facing serious medical challenges.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: We meet adventurous cat Oz, who dramatically broke his ankle falling from a significant height; Ollie, an eight-month-old Labrador puppy, is rushed to Fitzpatricks as a late-night emergency after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews are kept busy attending a man with a swollen leg, a fisherman having a stroke and a teenager whose chest pains turn out to be something totally unexpected.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A truck driver is trapped in his crushed cab after a motorway smash, while in Hull, firefighters handcuff a man to the rails of the Humber Bridge to stop him from jumping.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A woman fights for her life after being knifed by her former partner, while a teenager on her way to seeing two Youtube stars in a live appearance is felled by a falling tree.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: (Widescreen) Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden, Ruth Jones, Larry Lamb, Alison Steadman. First ever episode of the much-loved sitcom that launched Smithy onto the scene! After being phone buddies for months, Gavin and Stacey arrange a rendezvous in Leicester Square. (Subtitled, Audio Described)

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: After a huge misunderstanding on the phone, Stacey thinks Gavin has finished with her. He drives to Wales to explain and ends up taking her home with him. Having never been further than Bridgend before, her trip to Essex is an eye-opening experience that ends with the biggest surprise of all.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: After his initial angry reaction to Staceys news, Uncle Bryn agrees to drive everyone to Essex to meet the Shipmans. Pam has laid on a cracking spread and the party goes with a bang, but then Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that throws all the bonhomie out the window.

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.desc: The Death Cleaners help Lindsey after her mother and extended family leave everything they dont want at her house, causing her to lose her personal style.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis meets Oscar-winning actress Dame Judi Dench. Having graced the stage and screen for over 60 years, including iconic turns as Queen Elizabeth in Shakespeare in Love and MI5 chief M in Bond, Judi is regarded as one of Britains greatest ever actors. Louis meets Judi at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre and her life away from acting.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo resumes his tour of the Home Counties in the picturesque and historic county town of Guildford. His 1936 Bradshaws guide commends its `fine old castle keep and guildhall but makes no mention of its hilltop cathedral. Michael meets head guide Janet Matthews to discover the origins of the first Anglican cathedral to be built on a new site in the south of England since the Reformation, begun in 1936.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael is heading for Farnborough, Hampshire, famous today for its airshow and home to what was then the Royal Aircraft Establishment. Richard Gardner of the Farnborough Air Sciences Trust tells Michael about the boffins who worked here and the inventions they came up with, such as retractable landing gear and flight-pressurised suits.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his 1930s Bradshaws guide, Michael Portillo explores East Anglia between the wars. His railway journey begins at Sutton Hoo in Suffolk, where archaeologists made a staggering discovery.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his Bradshaws-inspired journey through East Anglia, where he discovers the Essex origins of the BBC, joins the Womens Land Army to pick damsons at Tiptree, and visits homes fit for heroes in Becontree.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to Blackpool to pick up a couple of unusual vehicles - a red 1970 Opel GT and a 1956 Ford Hot Rod pickup.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek meets the owner and builder of a sporty vintage Jaguar special, a Jaguar Viking.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: While the full force of the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain as Churchill replaces Chamberlain as prime minister.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Hukbalahap Rebels in the Philippines believe they have a new enemy - a vampire. The British claim that an RAF pilots incredible night vision comes from eating carrots.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team return to the Ulster Folk Museum in Northern Ireland, where items include a DeLorean car, a stone head dug up in a garden and a carving with links to maritime history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Silver expert Kate Flitcroft is shaken, not stirred, by a stunning fire extinguisher cocktail shaker that turns up, while ceramics expert Eric Knowles meets his match with a cheeky toy monkey popping out of a musical pineapple.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on a modern day fast Ford to see if a quick flip could make a few quid and revisit a 3 year MG restoration project thats still not finished.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 90s Alfa with electrical issues lives up to its stereotype and the team revisit a road roller, four years on. They also tackle a French motoring icon, the Citroen 2CV6 Dolly.

programme.title: World at War

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo resumes his tour of the Home Counties in the picturesque and historic county town of Guildford. His 1936 Bradshaws guide commends its `fine old castle keep and guildhall but makes no mention of its hilltop cathedral. Michael meets head guide Janet Matthews to discover the origins of the first Anglican cathedral to be built on a new site in the south of England since the Reformation, begun in 1936.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael is heading for Farnborough, Hampshire, famous today for its airshow and home to what was then the Royal Aircraft Establishment. Richard Gardner of the Farnborough Air Sciences Trust tells Michael about the boffins who worked here and the inventions they came up with, such as retractable landing gear and flight-pressurised suits.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Despite having the largest pre-war European army, Frances outdated forces were humiliated by the Germans. programme.title: Rascals
programme.desc: The joys of conning, where two rival con-men attempt to outdo each other to woo a wealthy woman.

programme.title: Thank God
programme.desc: A real estate broker meets with an accident and wakes up in heaven, only to be informed by God that he must play a "Game of Life." If he manages to win, hell be sent back to Earth, but hell be sent to hell if he loses.

programme.title: Bholaa
programme.desc: After 10 years of imprisonment, Bholaa is finally going home to meet his young daughter. However, his journey is not so simple as he soon faces a pathway full of crazy obstacles, with death lurking around every corner.

programme.title: Singham Again
programme.desc: Drawing parallels to the Ramayana, Singham and his allies confront a mysterious antagonist in their quest to rescue his spouse.

programme.title: Luck by Chance
programme.desc: Not wanting the same fate as befell her sisters, Sona Mishra re-locates to Mumbai to try to make a living making movies, but she soon finds that the path she has chosen is not an easy one.
